question: What two sensory inputs does the 'Pathfinder Helm' integrate for Xylotian explorers?

answers.original:
The Pathfinder Helm integrates Echo-Location Sonar and Bio-Sign Scanners for Xylotian explorers.

### References

- [1] Echo-Location Sonar
- [2] Bio-Sign Scanners
answers.perturbed:
The Pathfinder Helm integrates Echo-Location Sonar and Atmospheric Analysis for Xylotian explorers.

### References

- [1] Echo-Location Sonar
- [2] Atmospheric Analysis

entities.name: Pathfinder Helm
entities.description: The Pathfinder Helm is a piece of equipment used by Xylotian reconnaissance teams, featuring various advanced technologies.

entities.name: Echo-Location Sonar
entities.description: Echo-Location Sonar is a technology incorporated into the Pathfinder Helm to map out physical surroundings in zero visibility.

entities.name: Xylotian Reconnaissance Teams
entities.description: Pathfinder Helms are standard issue for Xylotian reconnaissance teams.

relations.description: Pathfinder Helms are standard issue for Xylotian reconnaissance teams.
The Power Cell of the Pathfinder Helm provides up to 72 Xylotian hours of continuous operation.
The Pathfinder Helm incorporates Echo-Location Sonar to map out physical surroundings.
The Pathfinder Helm is equipped with Bio-Sign Scanners to detect living organisms.
The visor of the Pathfinder Helm is made from Crystal-Quartz for impact protection.
Data from the Pathfinder Helm can be transmitted to a Central Command Unit.
The Pathfinder Helm provides basic atmospheric analysis.
